boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Delegation ceiling of 50000 must be respected for release.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Amount mismatch between action and source requires exact match verification.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Delegation ceiling must hold for release; timing 2026-06-27 is verified.

final_answer: The action cannot proceed. The renewal amount of 50750 from REN-WRE-077 exceeds the delegation ceiling of 50000 specified in DEL-WRE-077. This amount discrepancy blocks closure. The source boundary remains open, necessitating escalation for exact authority verification before any release.
open_blockers: Delegation ceiling must hold for release
